nasb.text: Then Rabshakeh returned and found the king of Assyria fighting against Libnah, for he had heard that the king had left Lachish.

esv.text: The Rabshakeh returned, and found the king of Assyria fighting against Libnah, for he heard that the king had left Lachish.

cnv.text: 拉伯沙基回去，發覺亞述王正在攻打立拿，因為他曾聽說亞述王已拔營離開拉吉。

ccb.text: 亚述的将军听说亚述王已离开拉吉，便回去见王，发现王在攻打立拿。
